'''''Freedom I''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] that carried the Alliance ambassador and docked with the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] ambassador's shuttle ''[[Sar X]]'' at the [[Diplomatic Summit at Sullust|diplomatic meeting]] between [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] and the Alliance to Restore the Republic during [[Operation Strike Fear]]. The meeting was interrupted by the arrival of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']]. [[Hamo Blastwell]] and [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], flying [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]], held off the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]] until the meeting was concluded and all ships fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
